title: Model Division
essential_question: How can you use models to solve division problems?
strategies: Draw circles for each group, then deal counters one-by-one.
Use the total and number of groups to find how many in each group.

pretest.question: Six customers bought 18 jump ropes. Each bought the same number. How many did each buy?

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.6 Lesson 6.1 'Model Division' pp.221-224

learn.title: What Is Division?
learn.content: Division means sharing equally or making equal groups. 18 ÷ 6 means: put 18 into 6 equal groups — how many in each group?

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.6 Lesson 6.1 'Model Division' pp.221-224
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 1 Topic D — Division as Sharing and Measurement
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

learn.title: Model with Counters
learn.content: To solve 18 ÷ 6: draw 6 circles. Place 1 counter in each, then repeat. When all 18 counters are used, count: 3 in each circle. So 18 ÷ 6 = 3.

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.6 Lesson 6.1 'Model Division' pp.221-224
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 1 Topic D — Division as Sharing and Measurement
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

learn.title: Connect to Multiplication
learn.content: Think: 6 × ? = 18. Since 6 × 3 = 18, then 18 ÷ 6 = 3. Division and multiplication are related — one undoes the other.

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.6 Lesson 6.1 'Model Division' pp.221-224
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 1 Topic D — Division as Sharing and Measurement
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

learn.title: Bar Model for Division
learn.content: A bar model shows division visually. For 24 ÷ 4: draw a bar labeled 24. Divide it into 4 equal parts. Each part = 24 ÷ 4 = 6. The bar model shows the whole (24) and the parts (6 each).

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.6 Lesson 6.1 'Model Division' pp.221-224
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 1 Topic D — Division as Sharing and Measurement
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

learn.title: Parts of a Division Equation
learn.content: In 18 ÷ 6 = 3: the dividend (18) is the total being divided; the divisor (6) is how many groups; the quotient (3) is how many in each group. Always ask: total ÷ groups = each.

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.6 Lesson 6.1 'Model Division' pp.221-224
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 1 Topic D — Division as Sharing and Measurement
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

learn.title: 두 가지 나눗셈 — 나누어 주기 vs 묶어 세기
learn.content: 나눗셈에는 두 가지 상황이 있습니다. ① 분배 (partitive — 나누어 주기): 24개를 4명에게 똑같이 나누면 한 명당 몇 개?   → 24 ÷ 4 = 6 (한 명당 6개). ② 측정 (quotative — 묶어 세기): 24개를 4개씩 묶으면 몇 묶음?   → 24 ÷ 4 = 6 (6묶음). 두 상황 모두 같은 식 24 ÷ 4지만 의미가 다름! 흔한 실수 (M02): 두 상황을 헷갈려 답의 단위를 잘못 말함.

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.6 Lesson 6.1 'Model Division' pp.221-224
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 1 Topic D — Division as Sharing and Measurement
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

learn.title: 곱셈으로 나눗셈 풀기 — 패밀리 삼각형
learn.content: 나눗셈은 곱셈의 역연산. 24 ÷ 6 = ? 풀려면 '몇 × 6 = 24?'를 떠올려라. 패밀리 삼각형: 위쪽=곱(24), 아래 두 모서리=인수(4와 6). 한 모서리를 가리면 그 자리가 답: 4 × 6 = 24, 6 × 4 = 24, 24 ÷ 6 = 4, 24 ÷ 4 = 6. 이렇게 하나의 사실로 4가지 식을 모두 풀 수 있음. 흔한 실수 (M06): 곱셈 사실 외워놓고도 나눗셈에서 다시 처음부터 세는 학생 — '곱셈으로 풀어보자'라는 습관을 들이세요.

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.6 Lesson 6.1 'Model Division' pp.221-224
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 1 Topic D — Division as Sharing and Measurement
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

learn.title: 균등 분배 점검 — 모든 모둠이 같은가?
learn.content: 나눗셈은 항상 똑같이 나누는 것. 답을 구한 뒤 검증: 단계 1) 답 × 모둠 수 = 전체? (예: 24 ÷ 6 = 4 → 4 × 6 = 24 ✓). 단계 2) 모든 모둠 크기가 같은가? (그림으로 그려서 확인). 흔한 실수 (M04): 24를 5+4+5+4+3+3=24처럼 불균등하게 나누고 한 모둠을 답으로 — '똑같이' 조건 위반. 🔍 검증: 단계 1을 통과해도 단계 2를 빠뜨리면 잘못 — 두 가지 모두 확인.

verification.concept_source: Go Math Grade 3 Ch.6 Lesson 6.1 'Model Division' pp.221-224
verification.procedure_source: EngageNY Grade 3 Module 1 Topic D — Division as Sharing and Measurement
verification.assessment_source: Smarter Balanced Grade 3 Mathematics Item Specifications 2015

practice_r2.question: Find the difference: 803 − 467.
practice_r2.explanation: 803−467: 3−7 borrow → 13−7=6; tens 9−6=3 (after lending across zero); hundreds 7−4=3. Result: 336.

practice_r3.explanation: 72 ÷ 8 = 9 pens per pack. 9 − 4 = 5 left per pack. 5 × 8 = 40 pens remain.
hints: Step 2: subtract 4 from each pack (9 − 4 = 5). Step 3: multiply by 8 packs (5 × 8 = 40).

feedback.correct: Excellent! 72÷8=9, then 9−4=5 per pack, then 5×8=40 pens remain.
feedback.incorrect: Step 1: 8×9=72 → 9 per pack. Step 2: 9−4=5 left per pack. Step 3: 5×8=40.

practice_r3.question: A store receives 72 pens in 8 equal packs. After delivery, 4 pens are removed from each pack. How many pens remain in all?
practice_r3.feedback_correct: Excellent! 72÷8=9, then 9−4=5 per pack, then 5×8=40 pens remain.
